mapper.select: SELECT id, name, sort_order FROM skill_category ORDER BY sort_order DESC
SELECT t.id, t.category_id, t.name, t.icon_url, c.name AS category_name FROM skill_tag t LEFT JOIN skill_category c ON t.category_id = c.id ORDER BY c.sort_order DESC, t.id
SELECT t.id, t.category_id, t.name, t.icon_url, ms.level, ms.years FROM skill_tag t JOIN member_skill ms ON t.id = ms.skill_id WHERE ms.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY ms.level DESC
